sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85948" key="potamodia/rths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποτᾰμο-διάρτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">διαίρω</etym>) <sense id="n85948.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">river-ferryman,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
